expected.description:
(In a cryptography
context this is the preferred spelling, and it is already used that way
in Django's release notes.) This reduces ambiguity about whether
make_password() expects UTF-8 encoded Unicode text ("plain-text bytes")
or the unencrypted material for the user's password ("plaintext bytes").

(In a cryptography
context this is the preferred spelling, and it is already used that way
in Django's release notes.) This reduces ambiguity about whether
make_password() expects UTF-8 encoded Unicode text ("plain-text bytes")
or the unencrypted material for the user's password ("plaintext bytes").
Fix static typing of `compat.chardet`
Fix static typing of `compat.chardet`

Changed QuerySet.select_related() "called with no arguments" deprecation
warning to be issued only when called from outside Django.

Changed QuerySet.select_related() "called with no arguments" deprecation
warning to be issued only when called from outside Django.

When doing releases, the `do_django_release.py` script included, in the
generated checksum.txt file, a "<commit hash>  <version>" section for
the git tag for the release.

When doing releases, the `do_django_release.py` script included, in the
generated checksum.txt file, a "<commit hash>  <version>" section for
the git tag for the release.

`SimplerXMLGenerator` already rejected control characters (unsupported
in XML 1.0) in element content, but attribute values were written
unchecked, so unsanitized input could still produce an unparseable
XML document.

`SimplerXMLGenerator` already rejected control characters (unsupported
in XML 1.0) in element content, but attribute values were written
unchecked, so unsanitized input could still produce an unparseable
XML document.

`Cache-Control: private="Set-Cookie"`)
to be missed, allowing such responses to be stored in a shared cache.

`Cache-Control: private="Set-Cookie"`)
to be missed, allowing such responses to be stored in a shared cache.

Bcc addresses are sent via the SMTP envelope and must never appear in
the message itself.

Bcc addresses are sent via the SMTP envelope and must never appear in
the message itself.

Checking first reduces about 1 microsecond
off each decorator application.

Checking first reduces about 1 microsecond
off each decorator application.

The schema editor now records table renames while collecting SQL and
redirects constraint-name introspection to the still-existing old table
name, which carries the same constraints.

The schema editor now records table renames while collecting SQL and
redirects constraint-name introspection to the still-existing old table
name, which carries the same constraints.

Signal.receivers prunes dead weak references lazily, so a weak receiver
garbage-collected elsewhere could still occupy a slot when
BaseSignalSetup.setUp() counted receivers.

Signal.receivers prunes dead weak references lazily, so a weak receiver
garbage-collected elsewhere could still occupy a slot when
BaseSignalSetup.setUp() counted receivers.

Changed djangodocs extension to register DjangoHTMLTranslator for any
html-format builder (in the builder-inited hook), rather than a limited
list of builders at startup.

Changed djangodocs extension to register DjangoHTMLTranslator for any
html-format builder (in the builder-inited hook), rather than a limited
list of builders at startup.

Extracted the repeated `split(",")` + per-token `.strip()` pattern into
a `split_header_value()` generator in django/utils/http.py.

Extracted the repeated `split(",")` + per-token `.strip()` pattern into
a `split_header_value()` generator in django/utils/http.py.

In 8.4.0, set_parameter_source() was deferred
until after type conversion and flag-group arbitration (0f71fe7, #3403), so
get_parameter_source() returned None inside ParamType.convert() and eager
callbacks (#3458).

In 8.4.0, set_parameter_source() was deferred
until after type conversion and flag-group arbitration (0f71fe7, #3403), so
get_parameter_source() returned None inside ParamType.convert() and eager
callbacks (#3458).

Extracted helpers (get_commit_hash, parse_major_version,
find_release_artifacts, create_checksum_file) and isolated all
code with side-effects in main() guarded by __name__ == "__main__",
allowing the module to be imported without starting the release process.

Extracted helpers (get_commit_hash, parse_major_version,
find_release_artifacts, create_checksum_file) and isolated all
code with side-effects in main() guarded by __name__ == "__main__",
allowing the module to be imported without starting the release process.

This also frees up the `savepoint` name, which would allow the context
manager from `django-subatomic` to be included in Django.

This also frees up the `savepoint` name, which would allow the context
manager from `django-subatomic` to be included in Django.

The
SMTP EmailBackend detects and prevents that (#35713).

The
SMTP EmailBackend detects and prevents that (#35713).

Replaced the (currently unused) LazySettings._show_deprecation_warning()
with a module-level _show_settings_deprecation_warning() function.

Replaced the (currently unused) LazySettings._show_deprecation_warning()
with a module-level _show_settings_deprecation_warning() function.
Schema dependency discovery treated to_field values as raw field names, so attname aliases such as "primary_id" were not matched to the underlying relation field "primary".
Schema dependency discovery treated to_field values as raw field names, so attname aliases such as "primary_id" were not matched to the underlying relation field "primary".

Simplified and removed use of soon-to-be-deprecated or removed features
from tests for AdminEmailHandler and BrokenLinkEmailsMiddleware.

Simplified and removed use of soon-to-be-deprecated or removed features
from tests for AdminEmailHandler and BrokenLinkEmailsMiddleware.

Added missing test to verify Django's test runner swaps in the locmem
EmailBackend during tests.

Added missing test to verify Django's test runner swaps in the locmem
EmailBackend during tests.

Renamed shared backend test case class to SharedEmailBackendTests,
  to avoid confusion with tests for the BaseEmailBackend.

per_entry.error: auditor 'deepseek-coder-v2:latest' produced no schema-valid AuditReport after 3 attempts; refusing to emit a false all-clear.

expected.description:
Renamed shared backend test case class to SharedEmailBackendTests,
  to avoid confusion with tests for the BaseEmailBackend.

Since that was not done, a regression made it into Django 5.2
(50f89ae850f6b4e35819fe725a08c7e579bfd099) where `.header` no longer
corresponded to the request.META key under ASGI.

Since that was not done, a regression made it into Django 5.2
(50f89ae850f6b4e35819fe725a08c7e579bfd099) where `.header` no longer
corresponded to the request.META key under ASGI.

We need to switch on whether the request is a WSGI or ASGI request to
know whether to prepend `HTTP_`: we cannot assume sync exceution means
we are running under WSGI, as there could be other sync middleware
forcing sync execution under ASGI.

We need to switch on whether the request is a WSGI or ASGI request to
know whether to prepend `HTTP_`: we cannot assume sync exceution means
we are running under WSGI, as there could be other sync middleware
forcing sync execution under ASGI.

Setting "check" in OPTIONS["pool"] previously raised TypeError because the
PostgreSQL backend always passed check= to ConnectionPool() and unpacked
**pool_options on top, regardless of CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS.

Setting "check" in OPTIONS["pool"] previously raised TypeError because the
PostgreSQL backend always passed check= to ConnectionPool() and unpacked
**pool_options on top, regardless of CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS.

When `show_default` is set to a string on an option with `prompt=True`,
use that string in the prompt instead of the actual default value,
matching the behavior of the help text.

When `show_default` is set to a string on an option with `prompt=True`,
use that string in the prompt instead of the actual default value,
matching the behavior of the help text.

Improved tests by getting rid of obj.id % 2
approach for granting permissions per object
for users, since it is not the safest.

Improved tests by getting rid of obj.id % 2
approach for granting permissions per object
for users, since it is not the safest.

Implemented a new `warn_about_external_use()` helper to conditionally
issue warnings depending on whether a deprecated feature is used from
within Django.

Implemented a new `warn_about_external_use()` helper to conditionally
issue warnings depending on whether a deprecated feature is used from
within Django.

The new ModelAdmin.delete_confirmation_max_display attribute allows
limiting the number of related objects shown on the delete confirmation
page.

The new ModelAdmin.delete_confirmation_max_display attribute allows
limiting the number of related objects shown on the delete confirmation
page.

By default Flask will provide responses to OPTIONS requests that are
automatically generated.

By default Flask will provide responses to OPTIONS requests that are
automatically generated.

requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError are not deserializable: calling
`pickle.dumps` followed by `pickle.loads` will trigger an error.

requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError are not deserializable: calling
`pickle.dumps` followed by `pickle.loads` will trigger an error.

When we adjusted UNKNOWN handling for CheckConstraint in refs #33996 we assumed
that all usage of Q.check would benefit from this approach.

When we adjusted UNKNOWN handling for CheckConstraint in refs #33996 we assumed

The sort_keys parameter was added in PyYAML 5.1 (released March 2019).
The sort_keys parameter was added in PyYAML 5.1 (released March 2019).

The NamedTextIOWrapper is closing the buffers
that are owned by the StreamMixer, so
implement a close() method that prevents
it from doing that.

The NamedTextIOWrapper is closing the buffers
that are owned by the StreamMixer, so
implement a close() method that prevents
it from doing that.

admin_views.tests.SeleniumTests.test_inline_uuid_pk_add_with_popup.

The `body` property in `HttpRequest` checks DATA_UPLOAD_MAX_MEMORY_SIZE
against the declared `Content-Length` header before reading.

The `body` property in `HttpRequest` checks DATA_UPLOAD_MAX_MEMORY_SIZE

Edit permissions were still checked as part of ordinary form validation,
but because GenericInlineModelAdmin overrides get_formset(), it lacked
InlineModelAdmin's dynamic DeleteProtectedModelForm.has_changed() logic
for checking permissions server-side, leaving the add case unaddressed.

Edit permissions were still checked as part of ordinary form validation,
but because GenericInlineModelAdmin overrides get_formset(), it lacked
InlineModelAdmin's dynamic DeleteProtectedModelForm.has_changed() logic
for checking permissions server-side, leaving the add case unaddressed.
terminate() shouldn't assume the main server was started.
terminate() shouldn't assume the main server was started.

Used Django's OrderedSet datastructure instead of set() in MultipleChoiceField.validate()
to prevent submission ordering from being discarded during validation.

Used Django's OrderedSet datastructure instead of set() in MultipleChoiceField.validate()
to prevent submission ordering from being discarded during validation.

The `SQLCompiler.quote_name_unless_alias` method is kept for now as an alias
for the newly introduced `.quote_name` method but will be duly deprecated in
a follow up commit.

The `SQLCompiler.quote_name_unless_alias` method is kept for now as an alias
for the newly introduced `.quote_name` method but will be duly deprecated in
a follow up commit.

Modified lookup_field() in django/contrib/admin/utils.py to retrieve the
final field from the path when traversing relations using LOOKUP_SEP (__),
allowing display_for_field() to properly handle BooleanFields.

Modified lookup_field() in django/contrib/admin/utils.py to retrieve the
final field from the path when traversing relations using LOOKUP_SEP (__),
allowing display_for_field() to properly handle BooleanFields.

Replaced weak receiver registration in Signal.connect() to pass
_flag_dead_receivers directly as the callback for weakref.ref() and
weakref.WeakMethod() instead of creating weakref.finalize() objects.

Replaced weak receiver registration in Signal.connect() to pass
_flag_dead_receivers directly as the callback for weakref.ref() and
weakref.WeakMethod() instead of creating weakref.finalize() objects.

do_django_release.py were updated.

Docs and script
do_django_release.py were updated.

In order to ensure that user-defined `type_cast_value` hooks are never
called with a value of `UNSET`, it is necessary to intercept `UNSET`
values and, in the particular cases in which `UNSET` needs special
handling, preempt any call to `type_cast_value()`.

In order to ensure that user-defined `type_cast_value` hooks are never
called with a value of `UNSET`, it is necessary to intercept `UNSET`
values and, in the particular cases in which `UNSET` needs special
handling, preempt any call to `type_cast_value()`.

This fix introduces `safe_makedirs()` in the `os` utils as a safer
alternative to `os.makedirs()` that avoids umask-related race conditions
in multi-threaded environments.

This fix introduces `safe_makedirs()` in the `os` utils as a safer
alternative to `os.makedirs()` that avoids umask-related race conditions
in multi-threaded environments.

The
usage of `urlsplit()` in `URLField.to_python()` was replaced with
`str.partition(":")` for URL scheme detection.

usage of `urlsplit()` in `URLField.to_python()` was replaced with
`str.partition(":")` for URL scheme detection.

the "PYTHON_COLORS" environment variable to "0" for those specific tests,
which takes precendence over the presence of "FORCE_COLOR".

no subjectAltName.
